name: container-tracking-mcp
description: Container Tracking MCP server — track ocean containers across 200+ shipping lines (Maersk, MSC, CMA CGM, COSCO, Hapag-Lloyd, ONE, Evergreen) by container, B/L, or booking number: live milestones, vessel position, ETA, demurrage & detention. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP client.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --banner "#!/usr/bin/env node"

author: TrackingMCP <hello@trackingmcp.com>
